creator: beat@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Mozilla changed the policy to disable globally installed plugins by 
default. See: 
http://blog.mozilla.org/addons/2011/08/11/strengthening-user-control-of-add-ons/ 

As far as I know there is no workaround to disable this "feature" at the 
moment.
